title: Sole Source to Woods Hole Oceanographic Institute for Unmanned Underwater Vehicle Resilience In-Water Test Support  per attachments

body.description: Sole Source to Woods Hole Oceanographic Institute per the attached redacted justification. All quotes submitted in response to this announcement shall be reviewed if submitted by the close date. RFQ must include supporting documents: Capabilities Statement, Proof of past performance for similar work, and cage code.
